title: Daily Current Affairs Roundup
content: A daily overview of major developments in policy, economy, international relations and science.

title: India–Israel Ties: From Tactical Engagement to Structural Partnership
content:
India–Israel relations have evolved from cautious engagement to a deep strategic partnership across defence, technology, agriculture and innovation. India recognized Israel in 1950, while full diplomatic ties were established in 1992.

Trust strengthened during the Kargil War (1999), when Israel provided critical military supplies. In 2017, relations were elevated to a Strategic Partnership, marking deeper cooperation.

Today, collaboration spans AI, cybersecurity, space, agriculture and water technology. India imports nearly 34% of Israeli arms exports, while trade reached $3.62 billion in 2024-25. New initiatives in critical technologies and innovation highlight the partnership’s growing geopolitical and economic significance.

title: Supreme Court Emphasizes Transparency in Governance
content: The Supreme Court recently highlighted the importance of transparency and accountability in government institutions to strengthen democratic governance.
